fragment.choose:
<when condition="@{
            var jwtRequired = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("jwtRequired", "false");
            var authType = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("auth-type", "none");
            // Validate JWT if: (1) product requires it, or (2) a Bearer token was provided
            return jwtRequired.Equals("true", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                   authType.Contains("jwt");
        }">
            
            
                <when condition="@{
                    var authType = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("auth-type", "none");
                    return !authType.Contains("jwt");
                }">
                    
                    
                        <when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("jwtRequired", "false").Equals("true", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))">
                            
                                
                                
                                    application/json
                                
                                @{
                                    return new JObject(
                                        new JProperty("error", new JObject(
                                            new JProperty("message", "JWT Bearer token is required for this product. Provide via 'Authorization: Bearer {token}' header."),
                                            new JProperty("code", "jwt_required")
                                        ))
                                    ).ToString();
                                }
                            
                        
                    
                
                
                    
                    
                    
                    

                    
                    
                        <when condition="@{
                            var audience = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("jwt-audience");
                            var openidConfig = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("jwt-openid-config");
                            var issuer = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("jwt-issuer");
                            return string.IsNullOrEmpty(audience) || string.IsNullOrEmpty(openidConfig) || string.IsNullOrEmpty(issuer);
                        }">
                            
                                
                                
                                    application/json
                                
                                @{
                                    return new JObject(
                                        new JProperty("error", new JObject(
                                            new JProperty("message", "JWT authentication is not configured properly on the gateway."),
                                            new JProperty("code", "jwt_not_configured")
                                        ))
                                    ).ToString();
                                }
                            
                        
                    

                    
                    
                        <openid-config url="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("jwt-openid-config"))" />
                        
                            @(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("jwt-audience"))
                        
                        
                            @(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("jwt-issuer"))
                        
                    

                    
                    

                    
                        @($"Unified AI - JWT authenticated: {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("user-id", "unknown")} accessing {context.Request.Url.Path}")
